calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross M. Madden for Petitioner Miriam Helfgott
The Court noted that there was an untimely disclaimer, which he requested that counsel address. Mr. Madden responded that this was an unusual case where the beneficiary wanted to give her mother a larger share of the estate than her mother wanted to accept, and their inability to agree reuslted in the untimely disclaimer. He stated that the daughter would proceed in making the gift using her unified tax credit if the disclaimer is not accepted. The matter was taken under submission.
Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for Miriam Helfgott.

Mr. Madden stated that he did draft the will and that he recalls that Gene would not allow him to keep a copy. The Court will revoke the letters of administration issued to Stephen Helfgott and grant the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order and receipt of the order revoking letters). Bond is set at $20,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Continued To Mar-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
